title: Software Update - "1" or "2" tag on the tab if any component is outdated
scenario: Software Update tab shows a numeric tag indicating the count of outdated components
steps: Ensure one or more components are outdated.
Navigate to the Software Update tab.
Observe the tab for a numeric tag.
expected: The Software Update tab displays a numeric tag (e.g., "1" or "2") indicating the number of outdated components.
